prediction.reasoning: For a 1-day prediction of AON stock, I applied typical daily volatility patterns for large-cap financial services stocks. AON historically exhibits moderate volatility around 1-2% daily. The point estimate assumes no strong directional bias over such a short timeframe. Confidence intervals are constructed using approximately 0.9% (50%), 1.6% (80%), and 2.1% (90%) ranges based on historical intraday price movements and standard deviation estimates for similar financial services companies.
